sections.paragraph:
Original: אפקה

Transliteration: 'ăphêqâh

Phonetic: af-ay-kaw'

BDB Definition:

Aphekah = "enclosure"
  1. a city near Hebron in Judah
  2. (BDB) possibly a group of cities including Hebron

Origin: feminine of H663

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
